prompt_text: Suggest a healthy grocery list for a mother and a 2-year-old.
response_text:
# Healthy Grocery List for Mom & Toddler

## Proteins
- Eggs
- Greek yogurt
- Cheese (mild cheddar, mozzarella)
- Ground turkey or lean beef
- Chicken breasts
- Beans (canned, low-sodium)
- Nut butters (if no allergies)

## Fruits
- Bananas
- Apples
- Berries (blueberries, strawberries)
- Oranges
- Avocados
- Melon
- Peaches

## Vegetables
- Sweet potatoes
- Broccoli (soft, cut small)
- Carrots (steamed, soft)
- Peas
- Corn
- Spinach
- Bell peppers
- Cucumber

## Grains & Carbs
- Whole wheat bread
- Pasta
- Brown rice
- Oatmeal
- Whole grain cereals (low sugar)

## Dairy
- Milk
- Butter
- Plain yogurt

## Pantry Staples
- Olive oil
- Low-sodium broth
- Canned tomatoes
- Whole grain crackers

## Tips
- Choose soft or easily mashable foods for your toddler
- Avoid choking hazards (whole grapes, nuts, hard raw vegetables)
- Buy low-sodium options when possible
- Pick ripe but firm fruits for easy handling

Would you like specific meal ideas?
